title: Tuko 6packs Spiky Bounce Balls 6.5 CM - Sensory Light Up Balls,Squishy Stress Relief Fidget Squeezy Spikey Ball Toy Specially for Kids Party Bag Fillers
features: FLASH BALL SPIKY TOY: This Ball is made of high-quality which inserts a flash and can bounce, best for your kids. Bounce to flash and see how high you can make them bounce. It can attract the attention of pets, so you can play with your pets as well.

IDEAL FOR MANY STRESS-RELATED CONDITIONS! – Fidget toys are highly recommended for everyone and they are especially helpful for people who have ADD, OCD, ADHD, Autism, Depression, and other similar conditions since they can help shift someone’s attention and thus highly reduce their stress levels!

SAFE, NON-TOXIC & with LIGHT-UP FLASHING FEATURE! – Bounce to turn on, flashes for 10-15 secs before de-activating. High Quality Bounce Balls which are perfect for use as a great sensory light toy. The LED is contained within the ball and cannot be taken out which makes them safer than other similar models of spikey flashing balls.

STURDY, BOUNCY & SQUEEZABLE FLASHING BALLS – Whether in search of a new fidget toy or tactile / sensory toy, our spikey balls are perfect. Firm but squeezable, they’re perfect for sensory and tactile stimulation as tactile roll or a sensory brush. They’re bouncy too! Non Toxic, Water and weather resistant rubber material.

STRESS Reliever - Spiky Bounce with Sensory Light Up Balls have been a favorite school and therapy prize for a long time. There is a reason for that. Using our balls in a stressful environment can greatly release harmful stress whether it is for a kid who needs a healthy outlet or an adult who is having a stressful day at work. Use it and stay happy.
description: Product Description IDEAL FOR MANY STRESS-RELATED CONDITIONS! Fidget toys are highly recommended for everyone and they can help shift someone’s attention and thus highly reduce their stress levels! Effective stress relief toy Ideal to use as fidget and sensory stress relief toys for kids and adults. This light up balls features long and rubbery spikes to stimulate the hands and help with sensory challenges. FLASH BALL SPIKY TOY This flashing bouncy ball is very fun to play in the dark, and when they bounce, they glow with bright lights and colors, very eye-catching, nice for baseball, juggling, bending over ball, squash, baseball, bounce games, birthday parties, game prizes and more, which can be applied for classrooms, homes or offices, ideal for parents, teachers, students and so on
